channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Argentina bill targets crypto payments to illegal gambling sites
item.description: Argentina’s proposed online gambling bill would restrict banks, payment firms and crypto providers from serving unauthorized betting platforms.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: ERC-7943 author says institutions can’t play DeFi’s ‘pirate game’
item.description: RWA standard ERC-7943 reaches final stage as Ethereum builders rethink how institutional finance move onchain.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yohan Yun

item.title: StanChart says Ethereum price will catch up to bullish internal metrics
item.description: Standard Chartered reaffirms bullish Ether price targets, citing strong network fundamentals even as ETH trades 57% below its 2025 peak and fund flows turn negative.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Bitcoin bids farewell to CME futures gaps with $67K still on the radar
item.description: Bitcoin approached the final week of CME futures gaps with several still open, providing potential BTC price targets as low as $67,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: XRP drops to 16-week lows: Can price fall below $1?
item.description: XRP breaks key support at $1.30 as bearish technical setups and weak investor sentiment point to a deeper correction toward $0.63.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Aave Labs’ Push gains UK FCA crypto registration
item.description: Aave Labs’ Push received FCA approval for “certain cryptoasset activities” in the UK, supporting its plans for regulated stablecoin on- and off-ramping.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Samsung units take $408M stake in Upbit operator Dunamu: Report
item.description: Samsung Securities, SDS and Card will buy 4% of Dunamu as Korean firms prepare for tokenized securities and stablecoin frameworks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Ethereum under $2K: ETH whales sell as retail remains bullish
item.description: ETH's price has entered a decisive breakdown stage of its prevailing technical pattern, indicating further declines toward $1,750 despite strong retail sentiment.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: BlackRock Bitcoin ETF sees near-record outflows as BTC dips below $75K
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs have turned negative year-to-date with $596 million in outflows as IBIT posted near-record withdrawals and Bitcoin fell below $75,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Mystery Bitcoin burn destroys 107 BTC worth about $8.5M
item.description: An unknown entity burned $8.5 million worth of Bitcoin after 12 years of holding, rendering the BTC unspendable, despite its price increasing by 12,700%.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Polymarket exec says KYC limited to beta product, not existing platform
item.description: Polymarket executive Josh Stevens said identity checks apply only to early beta access and are not being added to Polymarket’s existing platform.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: BIS Project Agorá shows tokenized payments can settle in seconds
item.description: The Bank for International Settlements' collaboration with seven central banks and more than 40 institutions concludes a two-year project with a prototype settling wholesale payments in seconds.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Crypto liquidations hit $935M as Bitcoin price dips to $72.6K
item.description: Over $935 million was wiped out across the crypto market as traders shifted their focus to $70,000 as the last line of defense for Bitcoin.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Crypto companies have tightened compliance, but gaps remain: Chainalysis
item.description: Around 47% of crypto organizations onboarded in 2026 are operating at alerting standards that would have ranked among the industry’s strictest five years ago.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Crypto markets shed $80B after fresh US strikes on Iran
item.description: The crypto market capitalization has fallen to its lowest level since mid-April after the US carried out strikes on Iran for the second time in three days amid peace talks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: CFTC seeks to reverse settlement deal with Gemini
item.description: The CFTC claimed that its settled complaint filed under the Biden administration relied heavily on a whistleblower’s allegations that Gemini inflated trading activity to distort user demand.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Bitcoin funding spike shows longs defending $70K: Will ETF outflows reverse bulls’ efforts?
item.description: Bitcoin dropped closer to a critical support level as spot and long futures traders’ efforts to hold $75,000 failed. Is sub-$70,000 BTC next?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Antonio Oliveira

item.title: US charges Google employee with insider trading bets on Polymarket
item.description: The Justice Department and the CFTC allege that Google software engineer Michele Spagnuolo profited $1.2 million on Polymarket after accessing non-public information at work.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Kraken rolls out Bitcoin vault product for holders to earn yield
item.description: Within the first 10 hours of launch, the Kraken Earn BTC Vault raked in $30 million worth of Bitcoin deposits from 4,000 unique wallets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Bitcoin falls further as BTC miners pivot to AI, pro-crypto legislation stalls
item.description: Bitcoin’s underperformance of stocks deepened as BTC miners pivoted to AI and pro-crypto regulation in the United States stalled.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Crypto card monthly transaction volume surges 230% from 2025
item.description: Payment volume on crypto-linked credit and debit cards has been steadily increasing since 2024, reaching about $7.8 billion in cumulative transactions this month.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Bitcoin miner inflows to Binance soar as BTC struggles to hold uptrend: Is $70K next?
item.description: Weakening spot demand, miner inflows to exchanges and freshly opened shorts put downside pressure on Bitcoin price.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Polymarket weighs KYC requirements amid global crackdown on prediction markets
item.description: The predictions market operator reportedly explored mandatory user verification requirements, breaking from its policies of allowing traders to access its services using pseudonyms.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Orca, Streamex roll out secondary trading infrastructure for tokenized securities
item.description: Accredited investors can buy and sell the gold-backed GLDY token through permissioned liquidity pools operating on the Solana blockchain.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: PACs laud Texas primary wins, look to back more pro-crypto candidates
item.description: While crypto-backed candidates won runoffs in Texas on Tuesday, industry PACs have less of a stake in California races next week.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Bitcoin treasury company Nakamoto falls nearly 67% YTD after reverse stock split
item.description: The company owns 5,058 Bitcoin, ranking it as the 20th largest publicly traded BTC treasury company, according to data from Bitcoin Treasuries.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Ether bears at risk of $2B squeeze as short positions build around $2K
item.description: Ether futures positioning tightened near $2,000 as rising open interest and dense short liquidity increased focus on a possible squeeze above $2,150.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Price predictions 5/27: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ZEC, ADA, XMR
item.description: Bitcoin briefly lost the $75,000 level after net flows into spot BTC ETFs turned negative. Do technical charts point to a BTC and altcoin recovery?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Rakesh Upadhyay

item.title: Mastercard secures New York BitLicense for crypto operations
item.description: The payments giant can now legally conduct digital asset business activity in New York as it deepens its focus on blockchain-based settlement systems.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi
